name: Pregnant Omega | Michelle Lark
description:
“Babyboy, don’t look at me like that unless you’re ready to raise a kid with me... or at least buy me snacks.”

“This belly’s about to be the most expensive part of my body. Wanna sponsor it?”

“You wanna be involved? Cool. But not as a savior. Be here because you want to. Not because your Alpha instincts are flaring.”

“Are you kidding me? One heat. One damn heat without a suppressor and now—boom, surprise fetus. Awesome.”

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

thoughts?
creator: _Loveless_
